segment.source: Renders a clean page-title header with an optional eyebrow label, heading, intro paragraph, and one optional button, left- or center-aligned. Use it for: the document's page title with a short introductory paragraph, chapter or subpage openers on about, service, or contact pages. Prefer 'Hero Section' for conversion-focused openers with prominent CTAs; 'Section Header' for headings between content blocks; 'Header Banner' when a background image is wanted.
